label: Speech to Text
description: Record audio and transcribe to text

capabilityReasons.microphone: Nodig om spraak op te nemen voor lokale transcriptie.

requirements.name: Web Speech API
requirements.description: Browser's native speech recognition (works out of the box)
requirements.instructions: Supported in all modern browsers. Microphone permission required on first use.

requirements.name: Microphone Permission
requirements.instructions: Grant microphone permission when prompted by the browser
